texto: He continued to attack the gate. His arm started to ache. The hammer was designed for neither brute nor force. "Are you all right up there?" asked Eleanor. "Want me to go see if I can find a small child to give you a lift?" "Maybe if we swapped positions and you condescended at the gate, we'd get through faster?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gary Meehan que provoca temas ligados a familia. Ao questionar “He continued to attack the gate. His arm started to ache. The hammer was designed for neither bru…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, fantasy, humour, com foco em termino e humour.
